requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Lighting Radio Disturbance (GSO CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明无线电骚扰（GSO CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明無線電騷擾（GSO CISPR 15）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Bahrain market are expected to meet electromagnetic-emission limits for lighting equipment based on the GSO adoption of CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment). It covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals (150 kHz to 30 MHz) and radiated emissions (30 MHz to 300 MHz), assessed at the Bahrain supply of 230 V, 50 Hz. Conformity is demonstrated to BSMD (under MOIC) through an in-country importer, normally supported by an EMC test report from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory. Luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g., Bluetooth/Wi-Fi smart lighting) additionally require TRA (Telecommunications Regulatory Authority) type approval for the radio function.
summary.zh: 在巴林市场销售的 LED 灯具应满足以 GSO 采纳的 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）为基础的照明设备电磁发射限值。其涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及辐射发射（30 MHz 至 300 MHz），并在巴林 230 V、50 Hz 电源下评估。合格评定通过当地进口商向 BSMD（MOIC 下属）提交，通常以 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具的 EMC 检测报告作为支撑。集成无线功能的灯具（如蓝牙/Wi-Fi 智能照明）的无线电功能还须取得 TRA（电信监管局）型号核准。
summary.zht: 在巴林市場銷售的 LED 燈具應滿足以 GSO 採納的 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）為基礎的照明設備電磁發射限值。其涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及輻射發射（30 MHz 至 300 MHz），並在巴林 230 V、50 Hz 電源下評估。合格評定通過當地進口商向 BSMD（MOIC 下屬）提交，通常以 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具的 EMC 檢測報告作為支撐。集成無線功能的燈具（如藍牙/Wi-Fi 智能照明）的無線電功能還須取得 TRA（電信監管局）型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (GSO adoption of CISPR 15)
BSMD (MOIC) — conformity/registration for regulated products; TRA type approval for wireless/radio functions

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (covering both safety and EMC for relevant product categories), with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not accepted for Bahrain BSMD market access.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分，检测在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被巴林 BSMD 市场准入所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分，檢測在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被巴林 BSMD 市場准入所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: GSO CISPR 15 (Bahrain) and GB 17743 (China) both derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized. Key gaps: (1) conformity is non-mutual — Bahrain conformity is arranged through BSMD via an in-country importer, while China uses CCC, so a separate Bahrain EMC submission is needed; (2) the EMC test report should come from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory and reference the GSO/CISPR edition accepted by BSMD; existing CN CCC EMC reports cannot be reused directly; (3) testing is at 230 V, 50 Hz (Bahrain) versus 220 V, 50 Hz (China) — confirm the report covers the Bahrain supply rating; (4) if the luminaire incorporates a wireless function, TRA type approval is an additional, separate requirement on top of the lighting EMC evidence.
gap.zh: 巴林 GSO CISPR 15 与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调。主要差距：（1）合格评定不互认——巴林经当地进口商通过 BSMD 办理，中国采用 CCC，故须单独提交巴林 EMC 文件；（2）EMC 检测报告应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室，并引用 BSMD 接受的 GSO/CISPR 版本；现有中国 CCC EMC 报告不可直接复用；（3）检测须在 230 V、50 Hz（巴林）而非 220 V、50 Hz（中国）下进行——须确认报告涵盖巴林电源额定；（4）若灯具集成无线功能，TRA 型号核准为照明 EMC 证据之外的额外独立要求。
gap.zht: 巴林 GSO CISPR 15 與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調。主要差距：（1）合格評定不互認——巴林經當地進口商通過 BSMD 辦理，中國採用 CCC，故須單獨提交巴林 EMC 文件；（2）EMC 檢測報告應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室，並引用 BSMD 接受的 GSO/CISPR 版本；現有中國 CCC EMC 報告不可直接複用；（3）檢測須在 230 V、50 Hz（巴林）而非 220 V、50 Hz（中國）下進行——須確認報告涵蓋巴林電源額定；（4）若燈具集成無線功能，TRA 型號核准為照明 EMC 證據之外的額外獨立要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (regulated lighting) — lighting EMC emissions to GSO CISPR 15 expected for BSMD market access; TRA type approval additionally required for wireless functions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted by Bahrain via BSMD/MOIC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire EMC emissions for Bahrain are assessed against GSO CISPR 15, enforced by BSMD under MOIC through an in-country importer. Limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but the conformity routes are non-mutual, testing is at 230 V, 50 Hz, and the report must come from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory. Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require TRA type approval. Confirm the accepted GSO/CISPR edition with BSMD before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林 LED 灯具 EMC 发射按 GSO CISPR 15 评估，由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 经当地进口商执行。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但合格评定路径不互认，检测须在 230 V、50 Hz 下进行，且报告须来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须取得 TRA 型号核准。提交前请向 BSMD 确认接受的 GSO/CISPR 版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林 LED 燈具 EMC 發射按 GSO CISPR 15 評估，由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 經當地進口商執行。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但合格評定路徑不互認，檢測須在 230 V、50 Hz 下進行，且報告須來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須取得 TRA 型號核准。提交前請向 BSMD 確認接受的 GSO/CISPR 版本。

requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——照明设备（GSO IEC 61547）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——照明設備（GSO IEC 61547）

summary.en: Beyond emissions, lighting equipment intended for Bahrain is expected to demonstrate adequate electromagnetic immunity based on the GSO adoption of IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements). Typical immunity tests include electrostatic discharge (IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient/burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted RF disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), power frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8), and voltage dips/interruptions (IEC 61000-4-11), referenced to the Bahrain 230 V, 50 Hz supply. Where BSMD requires EMC conformity for the regulated lighting category, immunity evidence forms part of the technical file submitted through the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 除发射外，面向巴林的照明设备应基于 GSO 采纳的 IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）证明具备足够的电磁抗扰度。典型抗扰度试验包括静电放电（IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导射频骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）及电压暂降/中断（IEC 61000-4-11），并参照巴林 230 V、50 Hz 电源。在 BSMD 对受管制照明类别要求 EMC 合格评定时，抗扰度证据并入经当地进口商提交的技术文件。
summary.zht: 除發射外，面向巴林的照明設備應基於 GSO 採納的 IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）證明具備足夠的電磁抗擾度。典型抗擾度試驗包括靜電放電（IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導射頻騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）及電壓暫降/中斷（IEC 61000-4-11），並參照巴林 230 V、50 Hz 電源。在 BSMD 對受管制照明類別要求 EMC 合格評定時，抗擾度證據並入經當地進口商提交的技術文件。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (GSO adoption of IEC 61547)
BSMD (MOIC) — EMC conformity within the regulated lighting category

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is enforced less strictly than the CN emissions standard GB 17743; CCC for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. Products meeting EN/GSO/IEC 61547 immunity levels typically meet or exceed what the CN market routinely enforces.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743；针对中国灯具的 CCC 通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。满足 GSO/IEC 61547 抗扰度等级的产品通常达到或超过中国市场日常执行的水平。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743；針對中國燈具的 CCC 通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。滿足 GSO/IEC 61547 抗擾度等級的產品通常達到或超過中國市場日常執行的水平。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547)

gap.en: GSO IEC 61547 (Bahrain) and GB/T 18595 (China) share the same IEC 61547 technical base, so products tested to one will generally meet the other. The practical gap is procedural rather than technical: (1) China's GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard and immunity is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC, so a CN-market file may lack immunity evidence; (2) Bahrain submissions via BSMD should include immunity test results where the regulated category requires EMC conformity, sourced from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory and referencing the GSO/IEC edition accepted by BSMD; (3) reports should reflect the 230 V, 50 Hz supply. Confirm with BSMD/the in-country importer whether immunity evidence is required for the specific luminaire category before relying on emissions-only documentation.
gap.zh: 巴林 GSO IEC 61547 与中国 GB/T 18595 同以 IEC 61547 为技术基础，按其一检测的产品通常可满足另一标准。实际差距主要是程序性而非技术性：（1）中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准，抗扰度并非对所有灯具类别在 CCC 下普遍执行，故中国市场文件可能缺少抗扰度证据；（2）在受管制类别要求 EMC 合格评定时，经 BSMD 的巴林提交应包含抗扰度检测结果，来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并引用 BSMD 接受的 GSO/IEC 版本；（3）报告应反映 230 V、50 Hz 电源。在仅依赖发射证据前，请向 BSMD/当地进口商确认具体灯具类别是否要求抗扰度证据。
gap.zht: 巴林 GSO IEC 61547 與中國 GB/T 18595 同以 IEC 61547 為技術基礎，按其一檢測的產品通常可滿足另一標準。實際差距主要是程序性而非技術性：（1）中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準，抗擾度並非對所有燈具類別在 CCC 下普遍執行，故中國市場文件可能缺少抗擾度證據；（2）在受管制類別要求 EMC 合格評定時，經 BSMD 的巴林提交應包含抗擾度檢測結果，來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並引用 BSMD 接受的 GSO/IEC 版本；（3）報告應反映 230 V、50 Hz 電源。在僅依賴發射證據前，請向 BSMD/當地進口商確認具體燈具類別是否要求抗擾度證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC immunity to GSO IEC 61547 expected where BSMD requires EMC conformity for the regulated lighting category; evidence forms part of the technical file
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted by Bahrain via BSMD/MOIC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting EMC immunity for Bahrain is assessed against GSO IEC 61547, with immunity evidence forming part of the BSMD technical file where the regulated category requires EMC conformity. The standard is largely harmonized with China's GB/T 18595, which is recommended-only — so a CN-market file may lack immunity evidence and re-documentation against the GSO/IEC edition may be needed. Confirm with BSMD whether immunity testing is required for the specific luminaire category before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林照明 EMC 抗扰度按 GSO IEC 61547 评估，在受管制类别要求 EMC 合格评定时，抗扰度证据并入 BSMD 技术文件。该标准与中国 GB/T 18595 基本协调，而后者仅为推荐性标准——故中国市场文件可能缺少抗扰度证据，可能需按 GSO/IEC 版本重新记录。提交前请向 BSMD 确认具体灯具类别是否要求抗扰度检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林照明 EMC 抗擾度按 GSO IEC 61547 評估，在受管制類別要求 EMC 合格評定時，抗擾度證據並入 BSMD 技術文件。該標準與中國 GB/T 18595 基本協調，而後者僅為推薦性標準——故中國市場文件可能缺少抗擾度證據，可能需按 GSO/IEC 版本重新記錄。提交前請向 BSMD 確認具體燈具類別是否要求抗擾度檢測。
